case_title: JOE CORVINO VS. JOSE R RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORVINO, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE R AKA MR. RODRIGUEZ RODRIGUEZ, KATAH AKA MRS  RODRIGUEZ DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORVINO, JOE SERVED JAN-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE R AKA MR. RODRIGUEZ
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $1000.00 PER MONTH FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORVINO, JOE
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CORVINO, JOE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE R AKA MR. RODRIGUEZ RODRIGUEZ, KATAH AKA MRS  RODRIGUEZ

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORVINO, JOE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE R AKA MR. RODRIGUEZ RODRIGUEZ, KATAH AKA MRS  RODRIGUEZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 779 NAPLES STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
